# OpenCode Conventions

Conventions for OpenCode configuration and agent definitions under `.opencode/`.

<!-- BEGIN_TABLE: generated by scripts/generate-conventions-index.py, edits inside will be overwritten -->

| Convention | File |
| --- | --- |
| Do not set `temperature` in `.opencode/agents/*.md` frontmatter — most agents use reasoning models, and temperature settings can break those calls. | [no-agent-temperature](../conventions/opencode/no-agent-temperature.md) |

<!-- END_TABLE -->
